evals.prompt: What MCP tools does Directus expose? I just connected it and want to know what I can do with it
evals.expected_output: Lists all 12 MCP tools with their action patterns and the query system
expectations: Lists all 12 MCP tools by name
Mentions system-prompt tool as first call
Explains the unified action-based CRUD pattern

evals.prompt: I'm calling the Directus items tool but getting 'action is required' error. What am I doing wrong?
evals.expected_output: Explains the unified action pattern and that every Directus MCP tool requires an action parameter
expectations: Identifies missing action parameter as the cause
Lists valid actions: create, read, update, delete
Shows correct JSON example with action parameter
Mentions data must be an array for create
